rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits each claim against the evidence, identifying discrepancies and suggesting corrections.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags some uncertainties but could improve by addressing more aspects explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: The review stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors introduced; identifies issues in the original paper.
rationale.RX.5: Every major point is traced with sources and reasons.
